cleanTargets.description: Temporary files created by applications and the current user session
Temporary files created by Windows services and system processes
Application launch prefetch files used to speed up program startup
Windows system and component log files including CBS and DISM logs
Log files from Windows installation and upgrade processes
Cached thumbnails and icons for File Explorer; rebuilt automatically on demand
Cached font rendering data; rebuilt automatically by the Font Cache Service
Compiled DirectX shader cache used to reduce game and app load times
Cached web content from Internet Explorer and Windows system components
Downloaded Windows Update packages (may include pending updates that will need to re-download)
Cached update files used for peer-to-peer delivery optimization
Windows Error Reporting crash and problem reports for the current user
System-wide Windows Error Reporting crash and problem reports
User-mode application crash dump files
Kernel minidump files created during blue screen crashes
Cached MSI patch baseline files used for uninstall rollback
Archived Windows Event Log files (.evtx)
Historical scan results and detection records from Windows Defender
Files from a previous Windows installation kept for rollback; can be very large
Usage telemetry logs generated by the .NET Framework runtime (64-bit)
Usage telemetry logs generated by the .NET Framework runtime (32-bit)
Cached bitmap tiles from Remote Desktop sessions
Debug log files generated by Windows services such as Netlogon and WIA
Temporary files created by the Network Service system account
General-purpose caches used by Windows shell components
Windows Defender diagnostic and support log files used for troubleshooting
Windows Defender scan metadata and detection signature cache
Temporary files created by the Local Service system account
Network and system component diagnostic tracing log files
Transaction log files for the Windows Update database
Per-user Delivery Optimization cache files for Windows Update peer sharing
Reliability Analysis Component data collected for Reliability Monitor reports
Gather log files from the Windows Search indexing service
Event Trace Log files from Windows diagnostic data collection
Energy efficiency diagnostic reports generated by powercfg
Kernel live dump files created during abnormal system operations without crashing
Temporary files created by the Local System service account
Windows Defender Network Inspection Service diagnostic and support logs
Windows Defender real-time signature trace preprocessor files
Windows Firewall activity log files recording allowed and blocked connections
Windows System Assessment Tool benchmark results and performance data
Application compatibility analysis data and program inventory cache
Reusable UX Interaction Manager logs from Windows Update notifications
Cached certificate revocation lists and OCSP responses for the Local Service account
Cached certificate revocation lists and OCSP responses for the Network Service account
Cached certificate revocation lists and OCSP responses for the Local System account
Quality Windows Audio/Video Experience cached multimedia quality data
Peer-to-peer networking group data and connection traces
Windows Management Instrumentation event trace log files
HTTP.sys error log files from the Windows HTTP service
Results from elevated system diagnostic troubleshooters
Log files from Windows setup cleanup operations

singleFileTargets.description: Complete memory dump file created during a system crash; often several GB
Energy efficiency diagnostic report generated by powercfg /energy
